title: Individual Licence for Mobile Telecommunications
summary: Sets standard licence terms for mobile telecommunications operators, including network and service obligations, compliance duties, consumer obligations, numbering, interconnection, fees and spectrum-related conditions.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.licensing: Individual licence template for mobile telecommunications operators.

notes: Instrument type recorded as uncertain in the source (regulation?). Related instruments: Part of TRA Generic Forms of Telecommunications Licences
